phrases.intent_en: Ask where evening events are announced
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo ver el cartel de eventos de noche?
phrases.pronunciation: DOH-deh PWEH-do ver el kar-TEL de eh-VEN-tos de NOH-cheh?

likely_response.local: En el tablón junto al Ayuntamiento.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL tahb-LÓN HOON-toh AHL ah-yoon-tah-mee-EHN-toh
likely_response.translation_en: At the tourism office, in the back.

responses.english: At the tourism office, in the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL tahb-LÓN HOON-toh AHL ah-yoon-tah-mee-EHN-toh
responses.french: En el tablón junto al Ayuntamiento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find restaurants nearby
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme dónde hay restaurantes cercanos a la plaza?
phrases.pronunciation: poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DON-deh eye res-tah-RAHN-tehs ser-KAH-nohs ah lah PLAH-sah?

likely_response.local: Gire a la derecha, Calle Toro o Meléndez.
likely_response.pronunciation: HEE-reh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah KAHL-leh TOH-roh OH meh-LÉN-dehth
likely_response.translation_en: Calle Zaragoza has many options two minutes away.

responses.english: Calle Zaragoza has many options two minutes away.
responses.phonetic: HEE-reh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah KAHL-leh TOH-roh OH meh-LÉN-dehth
responses.french: Gire a la derecha, Calle Toro o Meléndez.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the café terraces are located
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde están las terrazas de los cafés?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lahs teh-RAH-sahs deh lohs kah-FEHS?

likely_response.local: Alrededor de la plaza, planta baja.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahl-reh-deh-DOHR DEH LAH PLAH-thah PLAHN-tah BAH-hah

responses.phonetic: ahl-reh-deh-DOHR DEH LAH PLAH-thah PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
responses.french: Alrededor de la plaza, planta baja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find out about evening concerts
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo puedo saber sobre los conciertos de noche?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moh PWEH-doh sah-BEHR soh-BREH lohs kohn-SYEHR-tohs deh NOH-cheh?

likely_response.local: Consulte la cartelera municipal o la oficina de turismo.
likely_response.pronunciation: kohn-SOOL-teh LAH kahr-teh-LEH-rah moo-nee-thee-PAHL OH LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH too-REE-smoh
likely_response.translation_en: Check the municipal board or the tourism office.

responses.english: Check the municipal board or the tourism office.
responses.phonetic: kohn-SOOL-teh LAH kahr-teh-LEH-rah moo-nee-thee-PAHL OH LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH too-REE-smoh
responses.french: Consulte la cartelera municipal o la oficina de turismo.
